ArticleExplanation.S: Article 21 guarantees every person the right to live with dignity and personal safety. If someone steals your money online, it directly threatens your livelihood and security, which this article protects.

Authority_TN.S: Tamil Nadu Police - Cyber Crime Wing, CB-CID, Chennai

Authority_MH.S: Maharashtra Cyber Department, BKC Cyber Police Station, Mumbai

Authority_UP.S: Uttar Pradesh Police - Cyber Crime Police Station, Lucknow

ArticleExplanation.S: Article 19 protects your right to express yourself freely, and Article 21 protects your life and personal liberty. Online harassment, stalking, or identity theft violates both your freedom of expression and your right to live without fear.

Authority_TN.S: Tamil Nadu Police - Cyber Crime Wing, CB-CID, Chennai

Authority_MH.S: Maharashtra Cyber Department, BKC Cyber Police Station, Mumbai

Authority_UP.S: Uttar Pradesh Police - Cyber Crime Police Station, Lucknow

ArticleExplanation.S: Article 21 guarantees your right to live with dignity, safety, and freedom from violence. No person, including a family member or spouse, can take away your right to live without fear of physical, emotional, or economic abuse.

RelevantLaw.S: Protection of Women from Domestic Violence Act, 2005

Authority_TN.S: Tamil Nadu State Commission for Women, Chennai & Protection Officer, District Magistrate Office

Authority_MH.S: Maharashtra State Commission for Women, Mumbai & Protection Officer, District Magistrate Office

Authority_UP.S: Uttar Pradesh State Commission for Women, Lucknow & Protection Officer, District Magistrate Office

ArticleExplanation.S: Article 14 ensures every person is treated equally under the law, including as a buyer of goods and services. Article 21 protects your right to a dignified life, which includes not being cheated by sellers or service providers.

Authority_TN.S: Tamil Nadu State Consumer Disputes Redressal Commission, Chennai

Authority_MH.S: Maharashtra State Consumer Disputes Redressal Commission, Mumbai

Authority_UP.S: Uttar Pradesh State Consumer Disputes Redressal Commission, Lucknow

ArticleExplanation.S: Article 14 ensures all workers are treated equally under the law regardless of background. Article 19 protects your right to form associations and unions, which includes the right to fair treatment at your workplace.

Authority_TN.S: Office of the Labour Commissioner, Tamil Nadu Labour Department, Chennai

Authority_MH.S: Office of the Labour Commissioner, Maharashtra Labour Department, Mumbai

Authority_UP.S: Office of the Labour Commissioner, Uttar Pradesh Labour Department, Lucknow

ArticleExplanation.S: Article 14 ensures equal treatment in property matters, so no one can illegally deny you your rightful ownership. Article 21 protects your right to shelter and livelihood, which are directly linked to property rights.

Authority_TN.S: District Collector & Revenue Divisional Officer, Tamil Nadu Revenue Department

Authority_MH.S: District Collector & Sub-Divisional Officer, Maharashtra Revenue Department

Authority_UP.S: District Collector & Tehsildar, Uttar Pradesh Revenue Department (Board of Revenue)
